biography: Joakim is a golfer known for his meticulous approach to the game. While details about his home club remain under wraps, those who know him describe a golfer dedicated to the sport and always up for a challenge.

Despite having only participated in one past Hector Trophée, Joakim's presence was certainly felt on the course. Although he has not yet captured the coveted Hector Trophée or the Victor Trophy, he remains a respected figure within the golfing community.
Currently considered retired from Hector Trophée events, there is always a possibility that Joakim could make a surprise return to the competition in the future.
